user.title: Connect WaterGuru sensors to PoolMath
user.description: This uses PoolMath's unofficial mobile-app endpoint. Enter the complete Authorization header beginning with `Basic `. Required WaterGuru values are FC, pH, and temperature. All other selectors are optional.

data_description.authorization: Complete value, including the word Basic and the encoded credential.
data_description.pool_id: UUID of the destination PoolMath pool.
data_description.fc_entity: Numeric free chlorine sensor in ppm.
data_description.temperature_entity: Water temperature sensor. Celsius is converted to Fahrenheit.
data_description.total_hardness_entity: Recorded in diagnostics only because PoolMath has no total-hardness field.
data_description.phosphate_entity: Recorded in diagnostics only because PoolMath test logs have no phosphate field.
data_description.copper_entity: Recorded in diagnostics only because PoolMath test logs have no copper field.
data_description.iron_entity: Recorded in diagnostics only because PoolMath test logs have no iron field.

reauth_confirm.title: Update PoolMath authorization
reauth_confirm.description: Enter a fresh complete Basic authorization header.

error.authorization_format: The value must begin with Basic followed by the encoded credential.
error.invalid_pool_id: The pool ID does not look valid.
error.invalid_time_zone: Select a valid IANA time zone.

abort.already_configured: This PoolMath pool is already configured.

init.title: Automatic synchronization schedule
init.description: Choose the time and time zone used for the once-daily PoolMath submission.

data_description.submit_time: The selected time is interpreted in the chosen time zone.
data_description.time_zone: Uses an IANA zone such as America/Chicago and follows daylight-saving changes.
data_description.max_reading_age_hours: Submission is blocked when any selected sensor is older than this limit.
